summary: Iteration 49 - Phase 2 Production Hardening Tests: All 25 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend tests passed. Verified Quote→Invoice→Contract E2E chain, System Health endpoint with workers/scheduler/memory checks, DSGVO checkbox in registration, legal link fixes, and Admin Dashboard health panel.
seed_data_creation: Test quotes, invoices, and contracts created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 production hardening features verified: (1) QuoteRequest model with discount_percent field works, (2) Invoice from Quote correctly uses upfront_eur, (3) Contract from Quote auto-populates customer, (4) Full E2E chain Quote→Invoice→Contract works, (5) System Health endpoint includes workers/scheduler/memory checks, (6) Admin Dashboard shows 6 health cards (System, Datenbank, Workers, KI-Engine, Scheduler, Memory), (7) Registration has DSGVO checkbox and trust signals, (8) Login footer links point to /de/impressum, /de/datenschutz, /de/agb, (9) Booking page at /termin renders correctly, (10) All regression endpoints return 200.
